rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"bytes32","name":"escrowId","type":"bytes32"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"bytes","name":"recipientHybridPk","type":"bytes"}],"name":"Unlock","type":"event"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Canonical interface every QIE arbitrator implements.
